messages.start: [62] Starting safer ZSH uninstall (restore + surgical strip)
messages.backupRootMissing: [62] Backup root {dir} does not exist -- nothing to restore
messages.noZshrcInBackup: [62] Backup {dir} contains no .zshrc -- nothing to restore
messages.stripped: [62] Stripped marker block '{name}' from {file} ({n} lines removed)
messages.stripNoBlock: [62] No '{name}' marker block found in {file} -- skipping
messages.stripNoFile: [62] {file} does not exist -- skipping marker strip
messages.doneSafe: [62] Done (safe mode). Open a new shell to verify.
messages.checkOk: [62] No lovable marker blocks present in ~/.zshrc
messages.checkResidual: [62] Residual marker block(s) still present in ~/.zshrc: {names}
messages.promptNonTty: [62] non-interactive shell -> defaulting to RESTORE (use --no-prompt to keep instead)
messages.promptKept: [62] Keeping current ~/.zshrc as-is (will still strip marker blocks)
messages.promptAbort: [62] User aborted -- pre-clear safety backup is intact, no further changes made
messages.preBackupManifest: [62] Pre-clear safety backup created at {dst} (contents listed above)
